fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Kansas Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Kansas - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity kansas, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to kansas, speech-language pathologist compact kansas, kansas speech-language pathologist endorsement application

board.name: Kansas Department for Aging and Disability Services — Hearing Aid & SLP
board.parent_dept: Kansas Department for Aging and Disability Services (KDADS)

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Kansas.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Submit application with $100 fee to KDADS.

telepractice_text: Kansas permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Kansas issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Kansas is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Kansas SLP license cost?
Is Kansas part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Kansas allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does Kansas have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Kansas participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Kansas without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Kansas?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Kansas while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Kansas is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
